meta.title: Alex Hollings talks deterrence on the Hermeus Podcast
meta.description:
This is a clip of Sandboxx News editor-in-chief Alex Hollings discussing a deployment to Africa and the importance of deterrence for the U.S. military. 

Make sure to watch the full podcast here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UHvs4nCA8ew
